1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry and kommunenummer

2.description: inspect distinct arjordbr values in AR50 to find agriculture code

3.description: select AR50 polygons with the agricultural code (reduced national layer)

4.description: select teig parcels in Stavanger (filter by kommunenummer)

5.description: reduce AR50 to municipality extent by intersecting municipality (step1) with AR50 agricultural polygons (step3)

6.description: find parcels (step4) that intersect the reduced AR50 agricultural polygons (step5)

7.description: collapse to one row per teig and get MIN distance or distinct teigid

2.sql: SELECT teigid, kommunenummer, matrikkelnummertekst, representasjonspunkt, omrade FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig WHERE kommunenummer = '1103';

1.description: get Stavanger municipality geometry (kommunenummer and omrade)

2.description: get parcels (teig) in the Stavanger municipality (will filter by kommunenummer from step 1)

3.description: get AR50 polygons (needed columns only) for later spatial filtering

4.description: reduce AR50 to polygons that intersect Stavanger municipality geometry (left: kommune omrade, right: AR50 wkb_geometry)

5.description: inspect artype codes present in AR50 within the municipality (group by artype, count) to identify agricultural code

6.description: filter reduced AR50 to the agricultural artype value identified from step 5

7.description: find parcels that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons (left: teig.omrade, right: AR50.wkb_geometry)

8.description: one row per parcel: group by teigid and kommunenummer to deduplicate
